title: Mamma
writer: Guido Cantini, Ela Elborg, Georg C. Klaren
actors: Emma Gramatica, Carola Höhn, Beniamino Gigli
plot: Matilde Sarni lives in her villa near Rome. She has a son who has just married Donata and who is coming home after a series of recitals in the States. Mario, her son, is a famous opera singer and he is twenty years older than his ...
